result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Cleans 'bin' and 'obj' directories recursively from the specified path, and then optionally restores the project.

Options:
  -p, --path <string?>    The root path to start cleaning from. [Default: Current directory]
  -n, --no-restore        If true, skips any restore operations. [Default: false]

commands.payload:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

  -n, --no-restore        If true, skips any restore operations. [Default: false]
